# allig8tor — AI Office Suite
# https://www.allig8tor.com

> allig8tor is an AI-powered office suite. Users describe deliverables in plain language and receive websites, presentations (.pptx), spreadsheets (.xlsx), Word documents (.docx), or PDFs.

## Product
- Website: https://www.allig8tor.com
- App (generator): https://www.allig8tor.com/app
- Sign in: https://www.allig8tor.com/login

## Capabilities
- AI website generator with live HTML preview
- AI PowerPoint / pitch deck generator (.pptx)
- AI Excel spreadsheet generator (.xlsx)
- AI Word document generator (.docx)
- AI PDF export

## Pricing
- Free tier available (no credit card)
- Paid plans are Starter ($149/mo), Pro ($399/mo), and Team ($999/mo), each with monthly usage limits

## Contact
- hello@allig8tor.com

## Legal
- Privacy: https://www.allig8tor.com/privacy
- Terms: https://www.allig8tor.com/terms
